summary: Frontend testing for Marketplace page and VIPPromoSection improvements. All requested features are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Marketplace page correctly displays published offers with filters (Tous, Trading, DeFi, NFT, Dev, Sécurité) and search functionality
Offer detail modal shows Pack/Bundle badge, title, description, 'Ce qui est inclus' section, price, and 'Acheter maintenant' button
VIPPromoSection component has IA Plus hero section prominently featured with sparkles icon, title, description and feature badges
VIPPromoSection has Pros carousel showcasing 6 professional types (Trader, Mentor, Analyst, Developer, Advisor, Security) with examples
VIPPromoSection shows Pro stats (50+ Pros vérifiés, 1000+ Sessions, 4.9★ rating) and What Pros Offer grid
VIP page displays all features: IA Illimité, Accès aux Professionnels, Communauté VIP, Alertes Personnalisées, Portefeuille Virtuel, Cours Avancés
seed_data_creation: Using existing test data: 1 Bundle offer 'Mon Offre Test' at $29.99
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketplace and VIPPromoSection features are complete. Marketplace shows 1 published offer with working filters, search, and detail modal with purchase functionality. VIPPromoSection (shown to non-VIP users on home tab) features IA Plus and Pros sections prominently. VIP page displays all 6 VIP features correctly.

features_tested.details: Shows 1 published offer 'Mon Offre Test' with Pack/Bundle badge, Pro creator, $29.99 price

features_tested.feature: Page /marketplace - Filtres par catégorie (Tous, Trading, DeFi, etc.)
features_tested.details: All 6 category filters working: Tous, Trading, DeFi, NFT, Dev, Sécurité. Trading/DeFi show 0 offers, Tous shows all offers
Search bar with placeholder 'Rechercher une offre...' filters offers correctly. Searching 'Test' shows matching offer

features_tested.feature: Page /marketplace - Clic sur offre ouvre modal de détail
features_tested.details: Clicking offer card opens 'Détail de l'offre' modal with all offer information

features_tested.feature: Modal détail offre - Affiche titre, description, prix, contenus inclus
features_tested.details: Modal shows: Pack/Bundle badge, 'Mon Offre Test' title, 'Description test', 'Ce qui est inclus' (0 contenus premium, Accès à vie), 0 Ventes, $29.99

features_tested.feature: Modal détail offre - Bouton Acheter maintenant fonctionne
features_tested.details: Purple gradient button with cart icon and 'Acheter maintenant' text is visible and clickable

features_tested.feature: Page /vip - Affiche les fonctionnalités VIP (IA, Pros, Communauté, Alertes)
features_tested.details: VIP page shows: Assistant IA Illimité, Accès aux Professionnels, Communauté VIP Exclusive, Alertes Personnalisées, Portefeuille Virtuel, Cours Avancés with price $6.99/month

features_tested.feature: VIPPromoSection - Section IA Plus mise en avant
features_tested.details: Component has dedicated AI Hero Section with sparkles icon, 'IA Plus' title, description, and 3 feature badges (Questions illimitées, Analyses en temps réel, Analyse de graphiques)

features_tested.feature: VIPPromoSection - Section Pros avec carousel de types (Trader, Mentor, etc.)
features_tested.details: Pros Hero Section with 'Accédez aux Meilleurs Pros' header, horizontal ScrollView carousel of 6 pro types (Trader, Mentor, Analyst, Developer, Advisor, Security), pro stats, and What Pros Offer grid

screenshots_taken: marketplace_page.png - Marketplace with 1 offer, filters, search bar
offer_detail_modal.png - Offer modal with all details and purchase button
marketplace_trading_filter.png - Marketplace with Trading filter showing empty state
vip_page.png - VIP page with all features listed
after_login.png - Home page after VIP user login showing VIP Space Active
